query: (cat:cs.CV OR cat:eess.IV OR cat:cs.AI OR cat:cs.LG OR cat:cs.MM OR cat:stat.ML) AND submittedDate:[202603220000 TO 202603222359]

papers.title: Mitigating Objectness Bias and Region-to-Text Misalignment for Open-Vocabulary Panoptic Segmentation
papers.summary: Open-vocabulary panoptic segmentation remains hindered by two coupled issues: (i) mask selection bias, where objectness heads trained on closed vocabularies suppress masks of categories not observed in training, and (ii) limited regional understanding in vision-language models such as CLIP, which were optimized for global image classification rather than localized segmentation. We introduce OVRCOAT, a simple, modular framework that tackles both. First, a CLIP-conditioned objectness adjustment (COAT) updates background/foreground probabilities, preserving high-quality masks for out-of-vocabulary objects. Second, an open-vocabulary mask-to-text refinement (OVR) strengthens CLIP's region-level alignment to improve classification of both seen and unseen classes with markedly lower memory cost than prior fine-tuning schemes. The two components combine to jointly improve objectness estimation and mask recognition, yielding consistent panoptic gains. Despite its simplicity, OVRCOAT sets a new state of the art on ADE20K (+5.5% PQ) and delivers clear gains on Mapillary Vistas and Cityscapes (+7.1% and +3% PQ, respectively). The code is available at: https://github.com/nickormushev/OVRCOAT
papers.title_zh: 减轻开放词汇全景分割的对象性偏差和区域到文本的错位
papers.summary_zh: 开放词汇全景分割仍然受到两个耦合问题的阻碍：(i) 掩模选择偏差，即在封闭词汇上训练的客观性头会抑制训练中未观察到的类别的掩模；(ii) 视觉语言模型（例如 CLIP）中有限的区域理解，这些模型针对全局图像分类而不是局部分割进行了优化。我们推出了 OVRCOAT，这是一个可以解决这两个问题的简单模块化框架。首先，CLIP 条件对象调整 (COAT) 更新背景/前景概率，为词汇外对象保留高质量掩模。其次，开放词汇表掩码到文本细化 (OVR) 增强了 CLIP 的区域级对齐，以改善可见类和未见类的分类，并且内存成本显着低于以前的微调方案。这两个组件结合起来共同改进物体估计和掩模识别，产生一致的全景增益。尽管其简单性，OVRCOAT 在 ADE20K 上树立了新的技术水平（+5.5% PQ），并在 Mapillary Vistas 和 Cityscapes 上取得了明显的进步（分别+7.1% 和 +3% PQ）。代码位于：https://github.com/nickormushev/OVRCOAT

papers.title: Plant Taxonomy Meets Plant Counting: A Fine-Grained, Taxonomic Dataset for Counting Hundreds of Plant Species
papers.summary: Visually cataloging and quantifying the natural world requires pushing the boundaries of both detailed visual classification and counting at scale. Despite significant progress, particularly in crowd and traffic analysis, the fine-grained, taxonomy-aware plant counting remains underexplored in vision. In contrast to crowds, plants exhibit nonrigid morphologies and physical appearance variations across growth stages and environments. To fill this gap, we present TPC-268, the first plant counting benchmark incorporating plant taxonomy. Our dataset couples instance-level point annotations with Linnaean labels (kingdom -> species) and organ categories, enabling hierarchical reasoning and species-aware evaluation. The dataset features 10,000 images with 678,050 point annotations, includes 268 countable plant categories over 242 plant species in Plantae and Fungi, and spans observation scales from canopy-level remote sensing imagery to tissue-level microscopy. We follow the problem setting of class-agnostic counting (CAC), provide taxonomy-consistent, scale-aware data splits, and benchmark state-of-the-art regression- and detection-based CAC approaches. By capturing the biodiversity, hierarchical structure, and multi-scale nature of botanical and mycological taxa, TPC-268 provides a biologically grounded testbed to advance fine-grained class-agnostic counting. Dataset and code are available at https://github.com/tiny-smart/TPC-268.
papers.comment: Accepted by CVPR 2026. Project page: https://github.com/tiny-smart/TPC-268
papers.title_zh: 植物分类学与植物计数的结合：用于计数数百种植物物种的细粒度分类数据集
papers.summary_zh: 对自然世界进行视觉编目和量化需要突破详细视觉分类和大规模计数的界限。尽管取得了重大进展，特别是在人群和交通分析方面，但细粒度、具有分类学意识的植物计数在视觉上仍然没有得到充分探索。与群体相反，植物在不同的生长阶段和环境中表现出非刚性的形态和物理外观变化。为了填补这一空白，我们推出了 TPC-268，这是第一个结合植物分类学的植物计数基准。我们的数据集将实例级点注释与林奈标签（界 -> 物种）和器官类别结合起来，从而实现层次推理和物种感知评估。该数据集包含 10,000 张图像和 678,050 个点注释，包括植物和真菌中 242 个植物物种的 268 个可计数植物类别，观测范围涵盖从冠层遥感图像到组织级显微镜。我们遵循类不可知计数 (CAC) 的问题设置，提供分类一致、规模感知的数据分割，以及基于最先进回归和检测的 CAC 方法的基准测试。通过捕获植物和真菌类群的生物多样性、层次结构和多尺度性质，TPC-268 提供了一个基于生物学的测试平台，以推进细粒度的类不可知计数。数据集和代码可在 https://github.com/tiny-smart/TPC-268 获取。

papers.title: Pruned Adaptation Modules: A Simple yet Strong Baseline for Continual Foundation Models
papers.summary: The continual learning literature has rapidly shifted from traditional class incremental learning (CIL) techniques to foundation model (FM)-based CIL methods without a clear understanding of how these newer approaches compare to strong, lightweight convolutional baselines. This abrupt transition has created a substantial methodological gap, making it difficult to assess whether recent FM-based CIL progress reflects genuine advances or merely the absence of rigorous baselines. To address this gap, we introduce Pruned Adaptation Modules (PAM), a simple yet effective method that freezes the vast majority of the pre-trained ResNet while enabling scalable continual adaptation through sparse task-specific layers. PAM yields up to a ~5x reduction in trainable parameters and a ~6x reduction in total parameters, significantly reducing the cost of continual updates. Across diverse benchmarks, PAM consistently mitigates catastrophic forgetting and outperforms state-of-the-art FM-based CIL approaches. Our findings position PAM as a strong and transparent baseline that helps bridge the gap between traditional and FM-based CIL, guiding future research for a more accurate assessment of true progress in continual adaptation. The code can be found at: https://github.com/ElifCerenGokYildirim/PAM.
papers.title_zh: 修剪适应模块：连续基础模型的简单而强大的基线
papers.summary_zh: 持续学习文献已迅速从传统的类增量学习 (CIL) 技术转向基于基础模型 (FM) 的 CIL 方法，但没有清楚地了解这些新方法与强大的轻量级卷积基线相比如何。这种突然的转变造成了巨大的方法论差距，使得很难评估最近基于 FM 的 CIL 进展是否反映了真正的进步，或者仅仅是缺乏严格的基线。为了解决这一差距，我们引入了修剪适应模块（PAM），这是一种简单而有效的方法，可以冻结绝大多数预先训练的 ResNet，同时通过稀疏的任务特定层实现可扩展的连续适应。 PAM 可使可训练参数减少约 5 倍，总参数减少约 6 倍，从而显着降低持续更新的成本。在不同的基准测试中，PAM 始终如一地减轻灾难性遗忘，并优于最先进的基于 FM 的 CIL 方法。我们的研究结果将 PAM 定位为强大且透明的基线，有助于弥合传统 CIL 和基于 FM 的 CIL 之间的差距，指导未来的研究，以便更准确地评估持续适应的真实进展。该代码可以在以下位置找到：https://github.com/ElifCerenGokYildirim/PAM。

papers.title: PAS3R: Pose-Adaptive Streaming 3D Reconstruction for Long Video Sequences
papers.summary: Online monocular 3D reconstruction enables dense scene recovery from streaming video but remains fundamentally limited by the stability-adaptation dilemma: the reconstruction model must rapidly incorporate novel viewpoints while preserving previously accumulated scene structure. Existing streaming approaches rely on uniform or attention-based update mechanisms that often fail to account for abrupt viewpoint transitions, leading to trajectory drift and geometric inconsistencies over long sequences. We introduce PAS3R, a pose-adaptive streaming reconstruction framework that dynamically modulates state updates according to camera motion and scene structure. Our key insight is that frames contributing significant geometric novelty should exert stronger influence on the reconstruction state, while frames with minor viewpoint variation should prioritize preserving historical context. PAS3R operationalizes this principle through a motion-aware update mechanism that jointly leverages inter-frame pose variation and image frequency cues to estimate frame importance. To further stabilize long-horizon reconstruction, we introduce trajectory-consistent training objectives that incorporate relative pose constraints and acceleration regularization. A lightweight online stabilization module further suppresses high-frequency trajectory jitter and geometric artifacts without increasing memory consumption. Extensive experiments across multiple benchmarks demonstrate that PAS3R significantly improves trajectory accuracy, depth estimation, and point cloud reconstruction quality in long video sequences while maintaining competitive performance on shorter sequences.
papers.title_zh: PAS3R：长视频序列的姿势自适应流式 3D 重建
papers.summary_zh: 在线单目 3D 重建可以从流视频中恢复密集的场景，但从根本上仍然受到稳定性适应困境的限制：重建模型必须快速融入新的视点，同时保留先前积累的场景结构。现有的流方法依赖于统一或基于注意力的更新机制，这些机制通常无法解决突然的视点转换，导致长序列上的轨迹漂移和几何不一致。我们介绍 PAS3R，一种姿势自适应流重建框架，可根据相机运动和场景结构动态调整状态更新。我们的主要见解是，具有显着几何新颖性的框架应该对重建状态产生更大的影响，而具有较小视点变化的框架应该优先考虑保留历史背景。 PAS3R 通过运动感知更新机制来实现这一原理，该机制联合利用帧间姿态变化和图像频率线索来估计帧重要性。为了进一步稳定长视野重建，我们引入了轨迹一致的训练目标，其中包含相对位姿约束和加速度正则化。轻量级在线稳定模块进一步抑制高频轨迹抖动和几何伪影，而不会增加内存消耗。跨多个基准的大量实验表明，PAS3R 显着提高了长视频序列中的轨迹精度、深度估计和点云重建质量，同时保持了较短序列的竞争性能。

papers.title: An InSAR Phase Unwrapping Framework for Large-scale and Complex Events
papers.summary: Phase unwrapping remains a critical and challenging problem in InSAR processing, particularly in scenarios involving complex deformation patterns. In earthquake-related deformation, shallow sources can generate surface-breaking faults and abrupt displacement discontinuities, which severely disrupt phase continuity and often cause conventional unwrapping algorithms to fail. Another limitation of existing learning-based unwrapping methods is their reliance on fixed and relatively small input sizes, while real InSAR interferograms are typically large-scale and spatially heterogeneous. This mismatch restricts the applicability of many neural network approaches to real-world data. In this work, we present a phase unwrapping framework based on a diffusion model, developed to process large-scale interferograms and to address phase discontinuities caused by deformation. By leveraging a diffusion model architecture, the proposed method can recover physically consistent unwrapped phase fields even in the presence of fault-related phase jumps. Experimental results on both synthetic and real datasets demonstrate that the method effectively addresses discontinuities associated with near-surface deformation and scales well to large InSAR images, offering a practical alternative to manual unwrapping in challenging scenarios.
papers.title_zh: 大规模和复杂事件的 InSAR 相位展开框架
papers.summary_zh: 相位展开仍然是 InSAR 处理中的一个关键且具有挑战性的问题，特别是在涉及复杂变形模式的场景中。在与地震相关的变形中，浅源会产生地表断裂断层和突然的位移不连续性，这会严重破坏相位连续性，并经常导致传统的展开算法失败。现有基于学习的展开方法的另一个限制是它们依赖于固定且相对较小的输入大小，而真实的 InSAR 干涉图通常是大规模的且空间异构的。这种不匹配限制了许多神经网络方法对现实世界数据的适用性。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于扩散模型的相位展开框架，该框架旨在处理大规模干涉图并解决由变形引起的相位不连续性。通过利用扩散模型架构，即使存在与故障相关的相位跳变，所提出的方法也可以恢复物理上一致的展开相场。合成数据集和真实数据集的实验结果表明，该方法有效地解决了与近地表变形相关的不连续性，并且可以很好地扩展到大型 InSAR 图像，为具有挑战性的场景中的手动展开提供了一种实用的替代方案。

papers.title: HELIX: Scaling Raw Audio Understanding with Hybrid Mamba-Attention Beyond the Quadratic Limit
papers.summary: Audio representation learning typically evaluates design choices such as input frontend, sequence backbone, and sequence length in isolation. We show that these axes are coupled, and conclusions from one setting often do not transfer to others. We introduce HELIX, a controlled framework comparing pure Mamba, pure attention, and a minimal hybrid with a single attention bottleneck. All models are parameter-matched at about 8.3M parameters to isolate architectural effects. Across six datasets, we find that the preferred input representation depends on the backbone, and that attention hurts performance on short, stationary audio but becomes important at longer sequence lengths. On a 5-minute speaker identification task with 30,000 tokens, pure attention fails with out-of-memory errors, while HELIX closes an 11.5-point gap over pure Mamba.
papers.title_zh: HELIX：利用混合 Mamba-Attention 扩展原始音频理解，超越二次极限
papers.summary_zh: 音频表示学习通常会单独评估设计选择，例如输入前端、序列骨干和序列长度。我们证明这些轴是耦合的，并且一种设置的结论通常不会转移到其他设置。我们介绍 HELIX，这是一个受控框架，比较纯 Mamba、纯注意力和具有单一注意力瓶颈的最小混合。所有模型均以约 830 万个参数进行参数匹配，以隔离架构效应。在六个数据集中，我们发现首选的输入表示取决于主干，并且注意力会损害短、静止音频的性能，但在较长的序列长度上变得很重要。在使用 30,000 个 token 的 5 分钟说话人识别任务中，纯注意力因内存不足错误而失败，而 HELIX 与纯 Mamba 相比缩小了 11.5 分的差距。

papers.title: A Large-Scale Remote Sensing Dataset and VLM-based Algorithm for Fine-Grained Road Hierarchy Classification
papers.summary: In this work, we present SYSU-HiRoads, a large-scale hierarchical road dataset, and RoadReasoner, a vision-language-geometry framework for automatic multi-grade road mapping from remote sensing imagery. SYSU-HiRoads is built from GF-2 imagery covering 3631 km2 in Henan Province, China, and contains 1079 image tiles at 0.8 m spatial resolution. Each tile is annotated with dense road masks, vectorized centerlines, and three-level hierarchy labels, enabling the joint training and evaluation of segmentation, topology reconstruction, and hierarchy classification. Building on this dataset, RoadReasoner is designed to generate robust road surface masks, topology-preserving road networks, and semantically coherent hierarchy assignments. We strengthen road feature representation and network connectivity by explicitly enhancing frequency-sensitive cues and multi-scale context. Moreover, we perform hierarchy inference at the skeleton-segment level with geometric descriptors and geometry-aware textual prompts, queried by vision-language models to obtain linguistically interpretable grade decisions. Experiments on SYSU-HiRoads and the CHN6-CUG dataset show that RoadReasoner surpasses state-of-the-art road extraction baselines and produces accurate and semantically consistent road hierarchy maps with 72.6% OA, 64.2% F1 score, and 60.6% SegAcc. The dataset and code will be publicly released to support automated transport infrastructure mapping, road inventory updating, and broader infrastructure management applications.
papers.title_zh: 大规模遥感数据集和基于 VLM 的细粒度道路层次分类算法
papers.summary_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 SYSU-HiRoads（一个大规模分层道路数据集）和 RoadReasoner（一个视觉-语言-几何框架，用于根据遥感图像自动进行多级道路测绘）。 SYSU-HiRoads 基于 GF-2 影像构建，覆盖中国河南省 3631 平方公里，包含 1079 个空间分辨率为 0.8 m 的影像图块。每个图块都用密集的道路掩模、矢量化中心线和三级层次标签进行注释，从而能够进行分割、拓扑重建和层次分类的联合训练和评估。在此数据集的基础上，RoadReasoner 旨在生成强大的路面掩模、保留拓扑的道路网络和语义一致的层次结构分配。我们通过明确增强频率敏感线索和多尺度上下文来加强道路特征表示和网络连接。此外，我们使用几何描述符和几何感知文本提示在骨架段级别执行层次推理，通过视觉语言模型查询以获得语言上可解释的等级决策。在 SYSU-HiRoads 和 CHN6-CUG 数据集上进行的实验表明，RoadReasoner 超越了最先进的道路提取基线，并生成准确且语义一致的道路层次结构地图，其中 OA 率为 72.6%，F1 分数为 64.2%，SegAcc 为 60.6%。数据集和代码将公开发布，以支持自动交通基础设施测绘、道路库存更新和更广泛的基础设施管理应用。

papers.title: MS-CustomNet: Controllable Multi-Subject Customization with Hierarchical Relational Semantics
papers.summary: Diffusion-based text-to-image generation has advanced significantly, yet customizing scenes with multiple distinct subjects while maintaining fine-grained control over their interactions remains challenging. Existing methods often struggle to provide explicit user-defined control over the compositional structure and precise spatial relationships between subjects. To address this, we introduce MS-CustomNet, a novel framework for multi-subject customization. MS-CustomNet allows zero-shot integration of multiple user-provided objects and, crucially, empowers users to explicitly define these hierarchical arrangements and spatial placements within the generated image. Our approach ensures individual subject identity preservation while learning and enacting these user-specified inter-subject compositions. We also present the MSI dataset, derived from COCO, to facilitate training on such complex multi-subject compositions. MS-CustomNet offers enhanced, fine-grained control over multi-subject image generation. Our method achieves a DINO-I score of 0.61 for identity preservation and a YOLO-L score of 0.94 for positional control in multi-subject customization tasks, demonstrating its superior capability in generating high-fidelity images with precise, user-directed multi-subject compositions and spatial control.
papers.title_zh: MS-CustomNet：具有分层关系语义的可控多主题定制
papers.summary_zh: 基于扩散的文本到图像的生成已经取得了显着的进步，但定制具有多个不同主题的场景，同时保持对其交互的细粒度控制仍然具有挑战性。现有的方法通常难以提供对主题之间的构图结构和精确空间关系的明确的用户定义控制。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 MS-CustomNet，这是一种用于多主题定制的新颖框架。 MS-CustomNet 允许对多个用户提供的对象进行零样本集成，最重要的是，它使用户能够在生成的图像中明确定义这些层次结构排列和空间放置。我们的方法确保个体受试者身份的保存，同时学习和制定这些用户指定的受试者间组合。我们还提供了源自 COCO 的 MSI 数据集，以促进对此类复杂的多主题作品的训练。 MS-CustomNet 提供对多主体图像生成的增强、细粒度控制。我们的方法在多主体定制任务中的身份保留方面获得了 0.61 的 DINO-I 分数，在位置控制方面获得了 0.94 的 YOLO-L 分数，展示了其通过精确、用户引导的多主体构图和空间控制生成高保真图像的卓越能力。

papers.title: NoOVD: Novel Category Discovery and Embedding for Open-Vocabulary Object Detection
papers.summary: Despite the remarkable progress in open-vocabulary object detection (OVD), a significant gap remains between the training and testing phases. During training, the RPN and RoI heads often misclassify unlabeled novel-category objects as background, causing some proposals to be prematurely filtered out by the RPN while others are further misclassified by the RoI head. During testing, these proposals again receive low scores and are removed in post-processing, leading to a significant drop in recall and ultimately weakening novel-category detection performance.To address these issues, we propose a novel training framework-NoOVD-which innovatively integrates a self-distillation mechanism grounded in the knowledge of frozen vision-language models (VLMs). Specifically, we design K-FPN, which leverages the pretrained knowledge of VLMs to guide the model in discovering novel-category objects and facilitates knowledge distillation-without requiring additional data-thus preventing forced alignment of novel objects with background.Additionally, we introduce R-RPN, which adjusts the confidence scores of proposals during inference to improve the recall of novel-category objects. Cross-dataset evaluations on OV-LVIS, OV-COCO, and Objects365 demonstrate that our approach consistently achieves superior performance across multiple metrics.
papers.title_zh: NoOVD：用于开放词汇对象检测的新类别发现和嵌入
papers.summary_zh: 尽管开放词汇目标检测（OVD）取得了显着进展，但训练和测试阶段之间仍然存在巨大差距。在训练过程中，RPN 和 RoI head 经常将未标记的新颖类别对象错误分类为背景，导致一些提案被 RPN 过早过滤掉，而其他提案则被 RoI head 进一步错误分类。在测试过程中，这些建议再次获得低分，并在后处理中被删除，导致召回率显着下降，最终削弱新类别检测性能。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种新颖的训练框架——NoOVD——它创新性地集成了基于冻结视觉语言模型（VLM）知识的自蒸馏机制。具体来说，我们设计了 K-FPN，它利用 VLM 的预训练知识来指导模型发现新类别对象，并促进知识蒸馏（无需额外数据），从而防止新对象与背景强制对齐。此外，我们引入 R-RPN，它在推理过程中调整建议的置信度，以提高新类别对象的召回率。对 OV-LVIS、OV-COCO 和 Objects365 的跨数据集评估表明，我们的方法在多个指标上始终如一地实现了卓越的性能。

papers.title: Semi-Supervised Learning with Balanced Deep Representation Distributions
papers.summary: Semi-Supervised Text Classification (SSTC) mainly works under the spirit of self-training. They initialize the deep classifier by training over labeled texts; and then alternatively predict unlabeled texts as their pseudo-labels and train the deep classifier over the mixture of labeled and pseudo-labeled texts. Naturally, their performance is largely affected by the accuracy of pseudo-labels for unlabeled texts. Unfortunately, they often suffer from low accuracy because of the margin bias problem caused by the large difference between representation distributions of labels in SSTC. To alleviate this problem, we apply the angular margin loss, and perform several Gaussian linear transformations to achieve balanced label angle variances, i.e., the variance of label angles of texts within the same label. More accuracy of predicted pseudo-labels can be achieved by constraining all label angle variances balanced, where they are estimated over both labeled and pseudo-labeled texts during self-training loops. With this insight, we propose a novel SSTC method, namely Semi-Supervised Text Classification with Balanced Deep representation Distributions (S2TC-BDD). We implement both multi-class classification and multi-label classification versions of S2TC-BDD by introducing some pseudo-labeling tricks and regularization terms. To evaluate S2 TC-BDD, we compare it against the state-of-the-art SSTC methods. Empirical results demonstrate the effectiveness of S2 TC-BDD, especially when the labeled texts are scarce.
papers.title_zh: 具有平衡深度表示分布的半监督学习
papers.summary_zh: 半监督文本分类（SSTC）主要是在自我训练的精神下工作的。他们通过对标记文本进行训练来初始化深度分类器；然后或者预测未标记的文本作为其伪标签，并在标记和伪标记文本的混合上训练深度分类器。当然，它们的性能在很大程度上受到未标记文本的伪标签的准确性的影响。不幸的是，由于 SSTC 中标签的表示分布之间的巨大差异导致的边距偏差问题，它们经常遭受低准确度的困扰。为了缓解这个问题，我们应用角度边缘损失，并执行多次高斯线性变换来实现平衡的标签角度方差，即同一标签内文本的标签角度的方差。通过平衡所有标签角度方差可以实现预测伪标签的更高准确性，其中在自训练循环期间对标记文本和伪标记文本进行估计。有了这种见解，我们提出了一种新颖的 SSTC 方法，即具有平衡深度表示分布的半监督文本分类（S2TC-BDD）。我们通过引入一些伪标签技巧和正则化项来实现 S2TC-BDD 的多类分类和多标签分类版本。为了评估 S2 TC-BDD，我们将其与最先进的 SSTC 方法进行比较。实证结果证明了 S2 TC-BDD 的有效性，特别是当标记文本稀缺时。

papers.title: SpatialFly: Geometry-Guided Representation Alignment for UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation in Urban Environments
papers.summary: UAVs play an important role in applications such as autonomous exploration, disaster response, and infrastructure inspection. However, UAV VLN in complex 3D environments remains challenging. A key difficulty is the structural representation mismatch between 2D visual perception and the 3D trajectory decision space, which limits spatial reasoning. To this end, we propose SpatialFly, a geometry-guided spatial representation framework for UAV VLN. Operating on RGB observations without explicit 3D reconstruction, SpatialFly introduces a geometry-guided 2D representation alignment mechanism. Specifically, the geometric prior injection module injects global structural cues into 2D semantic tokens to provide scene-level geometric guidance. The geometry-aware reparameterization module then aligns 2D semantic tokens with 3D geometric tokens through cross-modal attention, followed by gated residual fusion to preserve semantic discrimination. Experimental results show that SpatialFly consistently outperforms state-of-the-art UAV VLN baselines across both seen and unseen environments, reducing NE by 4.03m and improving SR by 1.27% over the strongest baseline on the unseen Full split. Additional trajectory-level analysis shows that SpatialFly produces trajectories with better path alignment and smoother, more stable motion.
papers.title_zh: SpatialFly：城市环境中无人机视觉和语言导航的几何引导表示对齐
papers.summary_zh: 无人机在自主探索、灾难响应、基础设施检查等应用中发挥着重要作用。然而，复杂 3D 环境中的无人机 VLN 仍然具有挑战性。一个关键的困难是 2D 视觉感知和 3D 轨迹决策空间之间的结构表示不匹配，这限制了空间推理。为此，我们提出了 SpatialFly，一种用于无人机 VLN 的几何引导空间表示框架。 SpatialFly 无需显式 3D 重建即可对 RGB 观测进行操作，引入了几何引导的 2D 表示对齐机制。具体来说，几何先验注入模块将全局结构线索注入到 2D 语义标记中，以提供场景级几何指导。然后，几何感知重参数化模块通过跨模态注意力将 2D 语义标记与 3D 几何标记对齐，然后进行门控残差融合以保留语义区分。实验结果表明，在可见和不可见的环境中，SpatialFly 始终优于最先进的无人机 VLN 基线，与不可见的 Full split 上的最强基线相比，NE 减少了 4.03m，SR 提高了 1.27%。额外的轨迹级分析表明，SpatialFly 生成的轨迹具有更好的路径对齐和更平滑、更稳定的运动。

papers.title: TabPFN Extensions for Interpretable Geotechnical Modelling
papers.summary: Geotechnical site characterisation relies on sparse, heterogeneous borehole data where uncertainty quantification and model interpretability are as critical as predictive accuracy for reliable engineering decisions. This paper presents an exploratory investigation into the use of TabPFN, a transformer-based tabular foundation model using in-context learning, and its extension library tabpfn-extensions for two geotechnical inference tasks: (1) soil-type classification using N-value and shear-wave velocity data from a synthetic geotechnical dataset, and (2) iterative imputation of five missing mechanical parameters ($s_\mathrm{u}$, $E_{\mathrm{u}}$, ${σ'}_\mathrm{p}$, $C_\mathrm{c}$, $C_\mathrm{v}$) in benchmark problem BM/AirportSoilProperties/2/2025. We apply cosine-similarity analysis to TabPFN-derived embeddings, visualise full posterior distributions from an iterative inference procedure, and compute SHAP-based feature importance, all without model retraining. Learned embeddings clearly separate Clay and Sand samples without explicit soil-type supervision; iterative imputation improves predictions for four of five target parameters, with posterior widths that reflect physically reasonable parameter-specific uncertainty; and SHAP analysis reveals the inter-parameter dependency structure, recovering established geotechnical relationships including the Skempton compression index correlation and the inverse dependence of preconsolidation pressure on water content. These results suggest the potential of foundation-model-based tools to support interpretable, uncertainty-aware parameter inference in data-scarce geotechnical practice.
papers.title_zh: 用于可解释岩土工程建模的 TabPFN 扩展
papers.summary_zh: 岩土工程场地表征依赖于稀疏、异构的钻孔数据，其中不确定性量化和模型可解释性与可靠工程决策的预测准确性一样重要。本文对 TabPFN（一种使用上下文学习的基于变压器的表格基础模型）及其扩展库 tabpfn-extensions 的使用进行了探索性研究，用于两个岩土推理任务：(1) 使用合成岩土数据集中的 N 值和剪切波速度数据进行土壤类型分类，以及 (2) 五个缺失力学参数 ($s_\mathrm{u}$,基准问题 BM/AirportSoilProperties/2/2025 中的 $E_{\mathrm{u}}$、${σ'}_\mathrm{p}$、$C_\mathrm{c}$、$C_\mathrm{v}$)。我们将余弦相似度分析应用于 TabPFN 派生的嵌入，可视化迭代推理过程中的完整后验分布，并计算基于 SHAP 的特征重要性，所有这些都无需模型重新训练。学习嵌入可以清楚地区分粘土和沙子样本，无需明确的土壤类型监督；迭代插补改进了对五个目标参数中的四个的预测，后验宽度反映了物理上合理的参数特定的不确定性； SHAP 分析揭示了参数间的依赖结构，恢复了已建立的岩土工程关系，包括 Skempton 压缩指数相关性和预固结压力对含水量的逆相关性。这些结果表明，基于基础模型的工具在支持数据稀缺岩土工程实践中可解释的、不确定性感知的参数推断方面具有潜力。
